id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

subject_actor_id.description: Actor identifier that receives a capability grant.

issuer_actor_id.description: Actor identifier that issued a capability grant.

scope.description: Requested operation scope must be a subset of this array. Empty scope matches only empty operation scope. Wildcard access requires explicit '*'.

allowed_operations.description: Explicit operations allowed by this capability grant.

denied_operations.description: Explicit operations denied by this capability grant.

memory_depth_allowed.description: Maximum memory depth accessible under this grant.

namespaces_allowed.description: Namespaces allowed under this grant; wildcard behavior must be explicit.

tools_allowed.description: Tool identifiers allowed under this grant.

skills_allowed.description: Skill identifiers allowed under this grant.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration timestamp encoded as a portable string or null.

signature.description: Optional portable signature or signature reference for the grant.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.
